# Dart language server test

# Start acme-lsp server with workspaces and rootdir to avoid hang
acme-lsp -headless -rootdir $WORK -workspaces $WORK -server '\.dart$:dart language-server' &

# Format file
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.dart:'#0'
L -headless fmt
# Give some time to dart to index the file and try again
exec sleep 1
L -headless fmt
cmp hello.dart after-format.txt

# Definition of "hello" from call site
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.dart:'#219'
L -headless def -p
stdout 'hello\.dart:.*:  void hello\(String name\) {'

# References to "hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.dart:'#219'
L -headless refs
stdout 'hello\.dart:.*:  g.hello\(''world''\);'
stdout 'hello\.dart:.*:  void hello\(String name\) {'

# Type definition of "g"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.dart:'#214'
L -headless type -p
stdout 'hello\.dart:.*:class WorldGreeter implements Greeter {'

# Signature of "hello" call
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.dart:'#222'
L -headless sig
stdout 'hello\(String name\)'

# Hover over method call "hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.dart:'#219'
L -headless hov
stdout 'void hello\(String name\)'
stdout 'Type: `void Function\(String\)`'
stdout 'Declared in `WorldGreeter` in _hello.dart_.}'

# Implementations of the interface Greeter
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.dart:'#18'
L -headless impls
stdout 'hello\.dart:.*:class WorldGreeter implements Greeter {'

# Completion after "g.hel" in the "hello" method call
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.dart:'#219'
L -headless comp
stdout 'hello\(…\)	\(String name\) → void'

# Symbols in the file
L -headless syms
stdout 'Greeter'
stdout 'WorldGreeter'
stdout 'main \(\)'
stdout '/hello\.dart:'
stdout 'hello \(String name\)'

# Rename WorldGreeter to EarthGreeter
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.dart:'#66'
L -headless rn EarthGreeter
cmp hello.dart after-rename.txt

-- pubspec.yaml --
name: hello
environment:
  sdk: '>=3.11.2 <4.0.0'
-- hello.dart --
abstract class Greeter {
  void hello(String name); }

class WorldGreeter implements Greeter {
  @override
  void hello(String name) {
    print('Hello, $name!'); } }

void main() {
  final g = WorldGreeter();
  g.hello('world'); }
-- after-format.txt --
abstract class Greeter {
  void hello(String name);
}

class WorldGreeter implements Greeter {
  @override
  void hello(String name) {
    print('Hello, $name!');
  }
}

void main() {
  final g = WorldGreeter();
  g.hello('world');
}
-- after-rename.txt --
abstract class Greeter {
  void hello(String name);
}

class EarthGreeter implements Greeter {
  @override
  void hello(String name) {
    print('Hello, $name!');
  }
}

void main() {
  final g = EarthGreeter();
  g.hello('world');
}
